creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
I also tried out linux-netscape under the new linux_base-7,
and I tried the link suggested.  I got hostname problems,
but not consistently so.  It seemed to work if I was trying
a hostname that happened to be in my /etc/hosts file, but
it didn't work for other hostnames.

-- 
Stephen Montgomery-Smith
stephen@math.missouri.edu
http://www.math.missouri.edu/~stephen
